description: HSM-backed vault secrets for AI agents (JIT fetch) plus prompt-injection and threat scanning.
name: io.github.1clawAI/1claw-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Agent API key (ocv_...). Exchanged for a short-lived JWT; auto-discovers agent ID and vault. Recommended for stdio.
environmentVariables.name: ONECLAW_AGENT_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional agent UUID when pinning identity (usually auto-discovered from the API key).
environmentVariables.name: ONECLAW_AGENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Optional vault UUID when the agent can access multiple vaults.
environmentVariables.name: ONECLAW_VAULT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Set to true for security-only mode (inspect_content only; no vault credentials).
environmentVariables.name: ONECLAW_LOCAL_ONLY

title: 1Claw Vault
